summary: Blog reflection on an American Farriers Journal article about a pony with scoliosis and kyphosis whose spinal deformities drove abnormal hoof growth, arguing hoof care must consider the whole horse.
Short customer testimonial from Lisa describing how her mare Apache wore Cavallo boots comfortably for 4-5 hours on rocky Back Country Horsemen trails without soreness.
Blog post comparing two lameness rehabilitation approaches for high-profile performance horses, contrasting pasture turnout recovery against stall rest with supplements and special shoes.
Post by Carole Herder about launching her book 'There Are No Horseshoes in Heaven', which became an Amazon #1 bestseller, and the barefoot/Cavallo boot community responses it sparked.
Customer story from Laura Herleth about her Cavallo boots surviving three days of deep mud trail riding in Shawnee Forest, praising their durability and value over horseshoes.
Blog post addressing owners' fear of removing horseshoes, using before/after photos to show hoof recovery three months after going barefoot with hoof boots.
Educational blog post on hoof pathologies (laminitis, thrush, abscesses, navicular) and the debate over ideal hoof conformation, distinguishing hoof anatomy from conformation.
Reflective blog post on building mutual trust between horse and rider through consistency, grooming, massage and time spent together.
Blog post offering a summertime challenge to explore new territory with your horse, suggesting new trails, trying a new discipline, and learning equine massage.
Announcement that Cavallo is an in-kind sponsor of Team Canada at the 2016 AQHA International Youth World Cup in Australia, providing Western saddle pads.
Profile of liberty rider Emma Massingale, a Cavallo brand ambassador who rides without reins or saddles, with her horses using Cavallo Trek Boots for training.
Update on Team Canada's placings at the 2016 AQHA Youth World Cup in Australia, listing individual rider results across cutting, trail, and equitation events.
